title: codereview pass 2: sim_validation.py reference in 2a.7.1 is too generic; needs specific CCP-16 metric test
description: tools/sim_validation.py only does general metrics export. Add or reference specific test for normative sampling (e.g. replay events from ccp_load_balancing.json and assert density/PER/channel_busy match Python sim). Update spec to point to exact test function or add to test/vectors/README.md.
